problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
